leadText: Smoked Fillet (Japanese: スモークきりみ Smoked Fillet) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very salty and bitter ingredient with that unmistakable smoky flavor. It pairs exceptionally well with veggies.
